steps.title: Identify the plural subject
steps.content: The plural subject “Both Heinrich Böll and Camilo José Cela” requires a possessive for “contributions.”

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: ”Their” is the plural possessive needed here. The other options are either contractions (A: it's, D: they're) or singular in number (C: its). That matches choice B — B is correct.
